title: importFromSeedHex torn-state comment incorrect
description: Line 93-94 of identity_service.dart: 'If setString throws, the old identity stays intact in both storage and memory — no torn state.' But the code does prefs.setString() first, then _initFromSeed(). If _initFromSeed throws after setString succeeds (unlikely but not impossible — the cryptography package calls into platform crypto which can fail), storage has the new seed but memory still has the old _keyPair/_pubId. On next app start, the new seed loads from storage resulting in a different identity than what the session was using. The comment should either acknowledge this residual case or the code should be reordered to match generate()'s memory-first pattern. Maintenance consequence: future maintainers will trust the 'no torn state' comment and not add recovery logic.
